summary: Position Manager API and UI testing complete. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Position Manager panel renders correctly with preview card showing Entry, SL, TP, R:R, ATR. OPEN LONG/SHORT buttons work, positions open/close correctly, history rows display with archetype badges. Current regime is TRANSICAO which maps to RANGE archetype with trailing_type=NONE, monitoring_required=false, tp_type=FIXED_POC.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/positions/evaluate/MNQ?side=BUY returns correct archetype, SL, TP, trailing config
✅ POST /api/positions/evaluate/MNQ?side=SELL returns correct params
✅ POST /api/positions/evaluate/MES?side=BUY returns correct params
✅ POST /api/positions/evaluate/INVALID returns 404
✅ RANGE archetype: trailing_type=NONE, monitoring_required=false, tp_type=FIXED_POC
✅ POST /api/positions/open with force=true creates paper position in MongoDB
✅ Position document contains all required fields (id, entry_price, hard_stop, current_stop, archetype, state, events, opened_at)
✅ Duplicate position protection: opening same symbol twice returns error
✅ GET /api/positions/active returns open positions
✅ GET /api/positions/active/{symbol} returns position for specific symbol
✅ PUT /api/positions/{id}/update-stop updates current_stop and adds event
✅ Invalid position ID returns 404
✅ POST /api/positions/{id}/close changes state to CLOSED and adds event
✅ Closing already closed position returns already_closed
✅ GET /api/positions/history returns closed positions
✅ Frontend Position Manager panel renders with preview card
✅ Frontend preview card shows Entry, SL, TP, R:R, ATR, Trailing
✅ Frontend OPEN LONG and OPEN SHORT buttons visible and functional
✅ Frontend active position card shows after opening position
✅ Frontend FECHAR (close) button works
✅ Frontend history rows render with archetype badge
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test positions created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Position Manager fully implemented and tested. Key details: 1) POST /api/positions/evaluate/{symbol}?side=BUY|SELL returns position params based on current regime. 2) POST /api/positions/open with force=true bypasses V3 validation and creates paper position. 3) Current regime is TRANSICAO which maps to RANGE archetype. 4) RANGE archetype has trailing_type=NONE, monitoring_required=false, tp_type=FIXED_POC. 5) TREND archetype (regimes 1,2,4) has trailing_type=VWAP_CENTRAL, monitoring_required=true. 6) FADE archetype (regime 5) has trailing_type=BREAK_EVEN with break_even threshold. 7) Frontend PositionPanel.jsx renders preview card, active position card, and history rows. 8) SignalStack orders are MOCKED in paper mode. 9) Market is closed (weekend) so data is simulated.

feature_verification.evaluate_endpoint: Working - returns regime, params, entry_price, levels
feature_verification.open_position: Working - creates paper position with all fields
feature_verification.duplicate_protection: Working - returns error for same symbol
feature_verification.active_positions: Working - returns list and by symbol
feature_verification.update_stop: Working - updates current_stop and adds event
feature_verification.frontend_preview_card: Working - shows Entry, SL, TP, R:R, ATR, Trailing
feature_verification.frontend_open_buttons: Working - OPEN LONG and OPEN SHORT functional
feature_verification.frontend_active_card: Working - shows position details and FECHAR button
feature_verification.frontend_history_rows: Working - shows archetype badge and close reason

mocked_api_note: SignalStack orders are not sent in paper mode. LiveDataService disabled. Delta Zonal uses simulation mode on weekends.
